headline: Assessing W. R. Berkley (WRB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Business scale and recent return profile W. R. Berkley (WRB) has seen its stock deliver a negative return over the past month and past 3 months, along with a negative 1 year total return. This comes despite a strong 3 year and 5 year total return history. The company, an insurance holding group headquartered in Greenwich, Connecticut, reports revenue of about US$14.7b and net income of roughly US$1.8b. This positions it as a sizeable commercial lines writer in the United States and...
